name: Dynavap The Wand - Glass Adaptor
summary: The Glass Adaptor makes using Dynavap with The Wand simple.
description: The Glass Adaptor makes using Dynavap with The Wand simple. No more swirling or angling; just place the device into the Wand 's heating ring and you're ready to start vaping in mere seconds. ( The Wand is not included ) This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
